generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local paper - our allies are cutting back on defense spending while expecting us to foot the bill. We're talking billions diverted from schools and hospitals! Remember when we stood united? Now it's every country for itself. Time to put America first and demand fair burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
